visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a serious expression. He is wearing round-rimmed glasses, a dark suit jacket, a white collared shirt, and a dark patterned tie. His hair is neatly combed back. The background is a muted green wall, with a dark wooden door frame visible over his left shoulder. The camera is steady, holding the close-up on his face. The audio is completely silent, with no dialogue, music, or sound effects present. The shot cuts to a slightly different angle of the same man. The camera is now closer to his face, and the background is a solid, out-of-focus green. He maintains his stern, focused gaze. The camera pans down, revealing the top of a woman's head with dark hair at the bottom of the frame. The shot is blurry and shaky, suggesting a quick movement or a point-of-view perspective. The camera focuses on the woman's face. She has long, dark hair and wide, concerned eyes. She looks up and to her right with a worried expression. The background is a soft, out-of-focus green and white. The camera remains shaky, enhancing the sense of unease or urgency.
